channel.title: Readme-Generator on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Readme-Generator on Arrans github.io

item.title: anuraghazra/github-readme-stats
item.description: ⚡ Dynamically generated stats for your github readmes

item.title: lowlighter/metrics
item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!
